Thank you.
Cuiwei

content.question:
Thanks.



Slide 4

Does this include comms

I like to understand

Slide 21

   we should keep to it?

Unless we find there are initiatives that is worth
   pushing?

Defined by increase in Total P&L



Slide 26-34

   - This is just a one -off clean up but it does not tell me what the
   issues were with these sellers in their export market. And how we will
   relook our listing procedure to even prevent these sellers from joining in
   the first place
   - And with all these changes, what will the seller fault RR be?
- And are we looking at other markets as well?

Slide 46
